title: × Anteriopaludorchis parvifolia
taxonomy: × Anteriopaludorchis parvifolia is a genus of orchid, with its classification not being well-documented. However, based on its name, it appears to be a hybrid orchid. The classification of orchids can be complex due to their high diversity and extensive hybridization. Further research is required to determine the exact classification of this plant. It is likely to be classified under the family Orchidaceae.
